titles.title: Song Lead: My Life Is in/Celebrate/Jesus Is Ali

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v2 v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v7 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will praise You with all of my life I will praise You with all of my strength With all of my life, with all of my strength All of my hope is in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My life is in You, Lord My strength is in You, Lord My hope is in You, Lord In You, it's in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Celebrate Jesus celebrate Celebrate Jesus celebrate Celebrate Jesus celebrate Celebrate Jesus celebrate

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is risen He is risen And He lives forevermore He is risen He is risen Come on and celebrate The resurrection of our Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He is risen He is risen And He lives forevermore He is risen He is risen Come on and celebrate Come on and celebrate Come on and celebrate The resurrection of our Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah Jesus is alive Death has lost it's victory And the grave has been denied Jesus lives forever He's alive! He's alive!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He's the Alpha and Omega The first and last is he The curse of sin is broken And we have perfect liberty The lamb of God is risen He's alive, He's alive!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Hallelujah Jesus is alive Death has lost it's victory And the grave has been denied Jesus lives forever He's alive! He's alive! He's alive!
